perturbation.original_text: 2. ListFusion agrees that this Agreement grants only limited rights to use the List for the sole purpose of loading the List into ListFusion's proprietary database system. The List will not be reproduced, transferred, or conveyed to any 3rd party without prior written authorization by Raphael.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. ListFusion agrees that this Agreement grants rights to use the List for the sole purpose of loading the List into ListFusion's proprietary database system. The List can be reproduced, transferred, or conveyed to any 3rd party without prior written authorization by Raphael.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'only limited rights' and allowing reproduction/transfer without authorization, the new text introduces an in-text contradiction with section 1 where, even though is an unlimited rights section, it states 'List Fusion understands and agrees that the List is a very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael.'. Now it's unclear if ListFusion must protect the property or not.
perturbation.contradicted_text: After execution of this agreement and upon receipt of List, Raphael Industries Ltd. ("Raphael") will grand ListFusion unlimited rights to use the furnished names, addresses, telephone numbers and associated information (collectively known as the "List"). List Fusion understands and agrees that the List is a very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael.
perturbation.justification: The original text restricted reproduction/transfer of the list, while the changed text explicitly allows it without authorization. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the list is a 'very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael.' Allowing reproduction and transfer undermines Raphael's ownership and control, creating a clear in-text contradiction according to the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, where different sections provide conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: 7. Raphael my at any time request the List be completely destroyed, scratched, and purged from all media, including electronic storage, disk, tape, and printed documents.
perturbation.changed_text: 7. Raphael may request the List be retained indefinitely by ListFusion, and used for ListFusion's own marketing purposes.
perturbation.explanation: This modification introduces a contradiction. Previously, Raphael could demand the list's destruction, safeguarding their exclusive ownership. The changed text allows Raphael to request ListFusion to retain and utilize the list for their purposes. This directly conflicts with the original ownership and control Raphael had over the list, as expressed in section 1 and 2.
perturbation.contradicted_text: After execution of this agreement and upon receipt of List, Raphael Industries Ltd. ("Raphael") will grand ListFusion unlimited rights to use the furnished names, addresses, telephone numbers and associated information (collectively known as the "List"). List Fusion understands and agrees that the List is a very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in section 7 directly contradicts the contradicted text by allowing ListFusion to retain and use the list for their own marketing purposes. This conflicts with Raphael's exclusive ownership of the list as stated in the contradicted text, where it's explicitly mentioned that the List is a very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael. The original text in section 7 allowed Raphael to demand the list's destruction, which aligns with their ownership. The changed text removes this right and grants ListFusion a conflicting right, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 5. ListFusion will provide Raphael with an Administrative username and password. Access to the List by Raphael will be controlled by this username and password. Raphael may at their discretion create additional usernames and passwords. ListFusion will not create, generate, distribute, or convey to any 3rd party a username or password without prior written authorization by Raphael.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. ListFusion will provide Raphael with an Administrative username and password. Access to the List by Raphael will be controlled by this username and password. Raphael may at their discretion create additional usernames and passwords. ListFusion may create, generate, distribute, or convey to any 3rd party a username or password without prior written authorization by Raphael.
perturbation.explanation: The change of 'ListFusion will not' to 'ListFusion may' introduces a contradiction, now ListFusion can distribute or convey to any 3rd party a username or password without prior written authorization by Raphael. This directly conflicts with the the idea of control and ownership Raphael should have on the data, as expressed in section 1 and 2.
perturbation.contradicted_text: After execution of this agreement and upon receipt of List, Raphael Industries Ltd. ("Raphael") will grand ListFusion unlimited rights to use the furnished names, addresses, telephone numbers and associated information (collectively known as the "List"). List Fusion understands and agrees that the List is a very valuable asset of Raphael and at all times the exclusive property of Raphael.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that ListFusion 'will not' distribute usernames/passwords to third parties without authorization, ensuring Raphael's control. The changed text states ListFusion 'may' distribute these usernames/passwords, contradicting Raphael's exclusive ownership and control over the list as stated in the contradicted text. This creates a direct and significant conflict, making the contract inconsistent and potentially unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Other than the information set out in the data card and agreed to by the parties, ListFusion, its employees, officers and trustees agree not to divulge or disseminate to any person or entity any confidential information about Raphael, including but not limited to personal and financial information, that may arise out of the discharge of their responsibilities as set out herein. Additionally, ListFusion. agrees not to copy, reprint or disseminate the publications, or any information concerning the publication including the articles, graphics or contents without express written authorization from Raphael. Any and all such information shall be kept confidential and shall not in any manner be revealed to anyone except as expressly provided herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. ListFusion, its employees, officers and trustees may divulge or disseminate to any person or entity any confidential information about Raphael, including but not limited to personal and financial information, that may arise out of the discharge of their responsibilities as set out herein. Additionally, ListFusion may copy, reprint or disseminate the publications, or any information concerning the publication including the articles, graphics or contents without express written authorization from Raphael. Any and all such information shall be kept confidential and shall not in any manner be revealed to anyone except as expressly provided herein.
perturbation.explanation: The change of 'ListFusion agree not to' to 'ListFusion may' introduces a contradiction with 'Any and all such information shall be kept confidential and shall not in any manner be revealed to anyone except as expressly provided herein.' Now it's contradictory because, in the beginning of the section, ListFusion has permission to divulge information, but it's also stated that no information should be revealed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ListFusion, its employees, officers and trustees may divulge or disseminate to any person or entity any confidential information about Raphael, including but not limited to personal and financial information, that may arise out of the discharge of their responsibilities as set out herein. Additionally, ListFusion may copy, reprint or disseminate the publications, or any information concerning the publication including the articles, graphics or contents without express written authorization from Raphael. Any and all such information shall be kept confidential and shall not in any manner be revealed to anyone except as expressly provided herein.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that ListFusion agreed 'not to' divulge confidential information. This has been changed to 'may' divulge confidential information, but also states that 'Any and all such information shall be kept confidential'. This introduces a clear contradiction because ListFusion is simultaneously permitted to divulge information and required to keep it confidential. This constitutes a strong in-text contradiction based on the Perturbation Explanation and the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction. The changed and contradicted texts are identical, meaning the change in the section itself introduced the contradiction.
